title: astragalus turgidus
intro: Astragalus turgidus, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus turgidus include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce stress and anxiety. Astragalus turgidus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
